  "claims": [
    "AB 1242 forges a legal path to protect reproductive digital information handled by companies headquartered in California.",

    "AB 1242 blocks out-of-state law enforcement officers from using California laws to execute search warrants on California corporations in furtherance of enforcing or investigating an anti-abortion crime.",
